description: Fotocasa is a Spanish real-estate marketplace for searching homes for sale and rent. It lists residential property ads and related housing information for consumers and real-estate professionals.
summary: Fotocasa exposes a public MCP server at `https://www.fotocasa.es/mcp` plus legacy SOAP-style HTTP web-service endpoints at `https://ws.fotocasa.es/mobile/api/v2.asmx` and `https://ws.fotocasa.es/mobile/api/v3.asmx`, whose authentication requirements are not clearly documented on the public pages found.
